childhood.familyBackground: A self-made billionaire, Christian Boehringer leads C.H. Boehringer Sohn AG & Co. KG, the parent company of Boehringer Ingelheim, one of the largest private pharmaceutical companies globally, founded
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 크리스티안 뵈링거는 독일의 제약회사인 보에링거 인겔하임의 모회사인 C.H. Boehringer Sohn AG & Co. KG를 이끌고 있습니다. 그는 자수성가한 억만장자입니다.
childhood.education: Details of Christian Boehringer's education are not widely documented in public sources.
childhood.educationKo: Christian Boehringer의 교육 세부사항은 공개 자료에서 널리 기록되지 않음.
childhood.earlyLife: Christian Boehringer built a career in Pharmaceuticals.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: Christian Boehringer은(는) Pharmaceuticals 분야에서 경력을 쌓음.

careerTimeline.event: Became a major figure in Pharmaceuticals

failures.description: COVID-19 pandemic impacted business operations globally
